subject: IBPS PO Pre 2025 Memory Based Paper (23rd August 1st Shift)
message: Generated questions based on the uploaded IBPS PO Pre 2025 PDF using the requested JSON format.

questions.question: How many persons sit between E and G?
Who among the following sits third to the left of G?
How many persons sit in the row?
How many meaningful words can be formed from the 3rd, 5th, 8th and 12th letter from the left end of the word FERMENTATION?
Which of the following is correct according to the passage regarding small enterprises like local kirana stores?

options.a: They have gained significantly from the rise in smartphone use.
options.b: They remain in a digital vacuum for 'near and now' inventory.
options.c: They are the primary beneficiaries of the online revolution.
options.d: They have easily adapted to numerous online platforms.

questions.question: What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following number series? 12, 13, 28, 87, 352, ?
Statements: Only a few Home are Office. All Office are Building. Some Building are House. Conclusions: I. Some Home are Building. II. No Office is House.

options.c: If either conclusion I or II follows.
options.d: If neither conclusion I nor II follows.
options.e: If both conclusions I and II follow.

questions.question: The perimeter of a square is equal to the perimeter of a rectangle. If the side of the square is 16 cm and the length of the rectangle is 20 cm, find the area of the rectangle.
